_comment: Antiquity's additions to Core's food-value table (FoodValueLoader merges all namespaces' files, later per-item wins). RULE (see Core main.json): each item's value equals its player-facing hunger NUTRITION. Dried meat = 4, dried fish = 3 (their FoodProperties nutrition), so a dried food sits BELOW its cooked equivalent (cooked meat 8 / cooked fish 5-6) but ABOVE raw (raw meat 2-3) and never spoils.
